headline: V&E Appoints Michael Jay as New IP Litigation Partner in LA
summary: By Karen Roman Vinson & Elkins said Michael Jay is the firm’s latest Los Angeles-based partner in its Intellectual Property & Technology Litigation practice, having previously served in the Patent Litigation Group at DLA Piper. Mr. Jay is a first-chair trial lawyer with more than 20 years of experience in patent and trade secret disputes […] The post V&E Appoints Michael Jay as New IP Litigation Partner in LA appeared first on CorpGov.

headline: Walmart (WMT) Secures Long Term Nuclear Power Deal With Constellation Energy
summary: Walmart has signed a long-term power purchase agreement with Constellation Energy to source emissions-free nuclear power for its U.S. operations. The wholesale nuclear supply is scheduled to begin in 2029 and is aimed at supporting Walmart’s cleaner energy goals. The agreement is one of the largest nuclear power commitments by a non-tech corporate buyer in the U.S. retail sector. Walmart, traded as NasdaqGS:WMT, is adding a new element to its energy mix with this nuclear power deal, tying...

headline: Will Constellation's Long-Term Nuclear PPAs Drive Sustainable Growth?
summary: CEG's long-term nuclear PPAs with Walmart and Meta highlight rising demand for carbon-free power and may support earnings and cash flow.
